import React, { useState } from 'react'; import { Link, useNavigate } from 'react-router-dom'; import { useAuthStore } from '../store/useAuthStore'; import { useOrderStore } from '../store/useOrderStore'; const Profile: React.FC = () => { const navigate = useNavigate(); const { user, isAuthenticated, logout, updateProfile } = useAuthStore(); const { orders } = useOrderStore(); const [isEditing, setIsEditing] = useState(false); const [editForm, setEditForm] = useState({ name: user?.name || '', phone: user?.phone || '', address: user?.address || '', }); React.useEffect(() => { if (!isAuthenticated) { if (confirm('请先登录，是否前往登录？')) { navigate('/auth'); } } }, [isAuthenticated, navigate]); React.useEffect(() => { if (user) { setEditForm({ name: user.name, phone: user.phone || '', address: user.address || '', }); } }, [user]); const handleLogout = () => { if (confirm('确定要退出登录吗？')) { logout(); navigate('/'); } }; const handleSaveProfile = () => { updateProfile(editForm); setIsEditing(false); alert('保存成功'); }; const orderStats = { total: orders.length, pending: orders.filter((o) => o.status === 'pending').length, completed: orders.filter((o) => o.status === 'delivered').length, }; if (!isAuthenticated || !user) { return null; } return (
{/* Header */}
🛒 电商平台
首页 商品列表 购物车 我的订单 个人中心
{/* Sidebar */}
{/* User Info Card */}

{user.name}

{user.email}

注册时间: {new Date(user.createdAt).toLocaleDateString('zh-CN')}

{/* Quick Stats */}

订单概览

{orderStats.total}
全部订单
{orderStats.pending}
待支付
{orderStats.completed}
已完成
{/* Menu */}
👤 个人信息 📦 我的订单 🛒 购物车
{/* Main Content */}

个人信息

{!isEditing && ( )}
{isEditing ? (
setEditForm({ ...editForm, name: e.target.value }) } className="w-full px-4 py-2 border border-gray-300 rounded-lg focus:ring-2 focus:ring-blue-500" />
setEditForm({ ...editForm, phone: e.target.value }) } className="w-full px-4 py-2 border border-gray-300 rounded-lg focus:ring-2 focus:ring-blue-500" />
setEditForm({ ...editForm, address: e.target.value }) } className="w-full px-4 py-2 border border-gray-300 rounded-lg focus:ring-2 focus:ring-blue-500" />
) : (
用户名
{user.name}
邮箱
{user.email}
手机号
{user.phone || '未设置'}
收货地址
{user.address || '未设置'}
)}
{/* Account Security */}

账号安全

🔐
登录密码
定期更换密码可以保护账号安全
📱
手机绑定
已绑定手机: {user.phone || '未绑定'}
✉️
邮箱绑定
已绑定邮箱: {user.email}
); }; export default Profile;

{
  "name": "ecommerce-platform",
  "private": true,
  "version": "1.0.0",
  "type": "module",
  "scripts": {
    "dev": "vite",
    "build": "tsc && vite build",
    "lint": "eslint . --ext ts,tsx --report-unused-disable-directives --max-warnings 0",
    "preview": "vite preview"
  },
  "dependencies": {
    "react": "^18.2.0",
    "react-dom": "^18.2.0",
    "react-router-dom": "^6.22.0",
    "zustand": "^4.5.0"
  },
  "devDependencies": {
    "@types/react": "^18.2.55",
    "@types/react-dom": "^18.2.19",
    "@typescript-eslint/eslint-plugin": "^6.21.0",
    "@typescript-eslint/parser": "^6.21.0",
    "@vitejs/plugin-react": "^4.2.1",
    "autoprefixer": "^10.4.17",
    "eslint": "^8.56.0",
    "eslint-plugin-react-hooks": "^4.6.0",
    "eslint-plugin-react-refresh": "^0.4.5",
    "postcss": "^8.4.35",
    "tailwindcss": "^3.4.1",
    "typescript": "^5.2.2",
    "vite": "^5.1.0"
  }
}

{
  "compilerOptions": {
    "target": "ES2020",
    "useDefineForClassFields": true,
    "lib": ["ES2020", "DOM", "DOM.Iterable"],
    "module": "ESNext",
    "skipLibCheck": true,
    "moduleResolution": "bundler",
    "allowImportingTsExtensions": true,
    "resolveJsonModule": true,
    "isolatedModules": true,
    "noEmit": true,
    "jsx": "react-jsx",
    "strict": true,
    "noUnusedLocals": true,
    "noUnusedParameters": true,
    "noFallthroughCasesInSwitch": true,
    "baseUrl": ".",
    "paths": {
      "@/*": ["src/*"]
    }
  },
  "include": ["src"],
  "references": [{ "path": "./tsconfig.node.json" }]
}
